name: md-editor
description: Markdown editor with live preview, tabs, outline, and HTML/DOCX/PDF export

scripts.version:sync: node -e "const p=require('./package.json'); const t=require('./src-tauri/tauri.conf.json'); t.version=p.version; require('fs').writeFileSync('src-tauri/tauri.conf.json', JSON.stringify(t, null, 2)+'\n')"
scripts.version:bump: node -e "const v=process.argv[1]; if(!v){console.error('Usage: npm run version:bump <patch|minor|major|X.Y.Z>');process.exit(1)} const fs=require('fs'); const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const parts=p.version.split('.'); if(v==='patch')parts[2]++;else if(v==='minor'){parts[2]=0;parts[1]++}else if(v==='major'){parts[2]=0;parts[1]=0;parts[0]++}else if(/^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/.test(v)){const nv=v.split('.'); p.version=nv.join('.')}else{console.error('Invalid version:',v);process.exit(1)} if(!/^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/.test(v))p.version=parts.join('.'); fs.writeFileSync('package.json',JSON.stringify(p,null,2)+'\n'); console.log('Bumped to',p.version)"

author: NeuroMafka
